name: Chicken Cabbage Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Chicken breast, skinned and boned, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all vegetables, along with broth, seasoning (except paprika), and juices to a 4-quart Dutch oven. Bring mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer at least 30 minutes.
2. In a non-stick skillet, brown chicken over medium heat, covering each side with paprika. Continue to brown until the chicken is no longer pink and cooked through (about 10 minutes).
3. Deglaze the sauté pan with 1/4 cup white wine.
4. Cut the chicken into cubes and add to cabbage broth, along with juices from the sauté pan. Cover the Dutch oven and continue to simmer for an additional 45 minutes.
